title: イエス！　レッツ・ハグ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm looking for some training
books in the library...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! I had my eye on that book you're holdin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Lemme tell ya somethin', partner...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm always thinkin' 'bout what I need to work on in
order to keep up with the pack, even in a
stampede!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I wanna hear your opinion! Lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Speed? Now there's an idea! Just gotta run fast,
get around your target, aaand...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I'll give it a shot right away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mere, hon! There's no escapin' this hug monster!
I'll chase ya to the edge of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Just gotta get a hold of everyone
with my power and...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I'll give it a shot right away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mere, hon! Get ready for the strongest hug
you've ever had in your life!
